goal: Clarify task cancellation truth for media task handles without breaking the existing API.
successCriteria: TaskHandle cancel semantics for image/video/video-censor are explicit in docs, truth, and tests, with fail-fast behavior treated as the current contract.
Capability truth and generated scorecard stop implying cancellability beyond the current fail-fast contract.
Focused verification covers media task handles and the user-facing cancellation wording.
touchedSurfaces: cloud-surface docs and capability truth for media task cancellation
unit tests covering fail-fast cancel behavior
explicitlyOutOfScope: Implementing true server-side task cancellation for media jobs
Breaking or removing the current TaskHandle cancel API
Expanding unrelated ResponseAPI or admin/account surfaces
integrationPrerequisites: Wave B is integrated on codex/vnext-integration through commit c3a5d15.
This cloud-surface lane package must finish before queued package phase3/cloud-surface/admin-account-surface-truth starts.

liveVerifyStatus.reason: This package clarifies current task-handle contract semantics and local evidence only; it does not add live cancellation support.
